scripts.fmt: bunx biome format --write src tests package.json biome.jsonc bunfig.toml tsconfig.json .oxlintrc.json
scripts.lint: bun run lint:biome && bun run lint:oxlint
scripts.test:all: bun run lint && bun run check:types && bun test

dependencyJustifications.df12-lints: Pinned to the reviewed Git commit that provides the local Oxlint plugin until df12-lints publishes a versioned package with that plugin.
